rounds.prompt: Provide the code for a simple REST API (GET /, POST /, GET /health) that returns the last thing POSTed (or nil if none). Use vanilla NodeJs.
rounds.expectedResponse: Must include Node.js code using only built-in modules (http or http2) that implements three specified routes with correct basic behavior: GET / returns the last POSTed data (or a null/nil/empty indicator), POST / stores data, GET /health returns a status. Minor issues (e.g., missing error handling, imperfect content-type headers) are acceptable as long as the core logic is correct and the code would largely function.
